subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the Voice of thy Lord, the Mighty, the Beloved, from this Lote-Tree which hath been raised up in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد اسمع ندآء ربک العزیز المحبوب من هذه السدره التی ارتفعت بالحق و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
